title: SnappChart for Day Trading
author: BrilliantWaltz6397
selftext:
I built snappchart and have been using it for myself for awhile and thought it was useful for the broader community. 

As a beginner day trader starting out, i always wanted to have a mentor of sorts to guide me in my trading decisions and point me to whats right or wrong. I’ve found ross cameron’s resources helping me alot in this aspect but when it comes to live trades, you only got yourself to rely on. Thats why i built snappchart to help me justify my trading decisions, build discipline and learn along the way. It’s not gonna be a magic tool that tells you magic entries and exits, but it’s a tool that helps facilitates your decision making right before making a trade

Hope anyone will find it helpful, open to feedback on how i can improve this too. 

Theres a short clip which shows how one can interact and make trades w snappchart: 

https://www.tiktok.com/@snappchart/video/7570362710345436434
